summary: Taiki has flipped decisively bullish in his most recent video, explicitly stating 'The Bottom Is In' and predicting that BTC is poised to move higher.
narrative: After spending late 2025 aggressively shorting ETH for large profits, he shifted his outlook in early 2026 to optimism on altcoins. He now argues that the market has bottomed, citing specific leverage mechanics and criticizing 4-Year Cycle theorists to support his thesis that prices are ready to rise.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
